note: Phase 5 (Emerging Topics) in progress. Topic 26 completed: Journey Orchestration Platforms covering market evolution from marketing automation to real-time decisioning engines, three-tier platform segmentation (enterprise marketing clouds, mobile-first engagement platforms, CX orchestration), detailed comparison of 6 major platforms (Adobe Journey Optimizer, Braze, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Genesys, Insider One, Qualtrics), CDP integration architecture patterns, Gartner/Forrester analyst perspectives, agentic AI orchestration trends, and platform selection framework with weighted scorecards. Key insights: orchestration platforms are the execution layer for journey-centric operating models, market consolidating toward unified CDP+orchestration platforms, shift from static rule-based paths to AI-driven autonomous journey management, and recognition that journey orchestration is table stakes (not nice-to-have) for digital experience leaders. Critical distinction: mapping tools visualize and align, orchestration platforms execute and optimize in real-time. Next topic (27): Design System Tooling.
